data.title: Charlie Munger's Investment Wisdom: '95% Of People Have No Chance Of Beating S&P 500 Index'
data.description: The late Charlie Munger, renowned investor and vice chairman of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK.A), once asserted that 95% of investors stand no chance of outperforming the S&P 500 Index.

data.title: Elon Musk Battles OpenAI Over Move To For-Profit Model — And Experts Are Pushing Back
data.description: OpenAI, the artificial intelligence research lab, is under fire for its plans to transition from a non-profit to a for-profit business.

data.title: Winners And Losers In The Real Estate Market—American Homeowners Are Sitting On $11.2 Trillion In Equity
Robert Kiyosaki Forecasts Global Financial Meltdown, Recommends Bitcoin As Safe Haven: 'Buy Bitcoin, Gold and Silver'
data.description: Author Robert Kiyosaki has raised an alarm about the potential collapse of the world’s financial system, advocating Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) as a possible safeguard

data.title: Trump To Declare English Official Language of US: What Does Executive Mean?
data.description: Trump's executive order designates English as the official U.S. language, rolling back language service requirements for non-English speakers.
